title: Hickory Man's Second-Chance Lottery Win
summary: A Hickory man won $100,000 from a losing scratch-off ticket in a second-chance drawing, proving that even discarded tickets can hold value.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the potential for unexpected wins and encourages people to explore second-chance opportunities.

title: Arrest in 1993 Charlotte Rape Case
summary: Decades after the crime, an arrest has been made in the 1993 rape of a 79-year-old Charlotte woman, thanks to advanced DNA analysis.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates the persistence of law enforcement and the power of DNA technology in solving cold cases.

title: Mecklenburg Deputy Fired After Domestic Violence Arrest
summary: Deputy Francisco Ramos was fired after being arrested for assaulting his wife. The Sheriff's office has a zero-tolerance policy for domestic violence.
charlotte_impact: Reinforces the importance of accountability and the serious consequences for law enforcement officers involved in domestic abuse.

title: Motorcyclist Dies from Crash Injuries in Charlotte
summary: A motorcyclist died from injuries sustained in a collision in the University City area on Sunday, April 19.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers faced by motorcyclists and the importance of road safety awareness.

title: Viral Delivery Driver Inspires Domino's Promo
summary: Domino's and Coca-Cola launch a nationwide promo code "DANTHEMAN" (April 30-May 3) honoring a viral Idaho delivery driver with free Coke.
charlotte_impact: Shows how a feel-good story can inspire national promotions and bring joy to customers.

title: Rep. Alma Adams Investigated, Cleared of Allegations
summary: Rep. Alma Adams was investigated for an alleged inappropriate relationship with a staffer in 2023 but was later cleared.
charlotte_impact: Addresses concerns about workplace conduct and the importance of thorough investigations.

title: Hot and Dry Weather Forecast for Charlotte
summary: Charlotte will experience hot and dry weather until Saturday, with chances of rain this weekend and next week.
charlotte_impact: Provides essential weather information for residents to plan their activities.

title: Avery County Wildfire 65% Contained
summary: The 70-acre wildfire near the Avery-Mitchell county line is now 65% contained. Officials have released the cause.
charlotte_impact: Informs the public about the progress in controlling the wildfire and the ongoing efforts to protect the environment.

title: School District Cancels Classes for Staff Rally
summary: Kannapolis City Schools cancels classes on May 1 so staff can attend a rally for increased public education funding.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the growing concerns about education funding and the lengths to which staff are willing to go to advocate for change.

title: CATS Seeks Input on Silver Line Changes
summary: CATS is seeking public input on potential cost-cutting changes to the Silver Line during a virtual meeting.
charlotte_impact: Allows residents to participate in the decision-making process regarding public transportation development.

title: Suspect Arrested for Deadly Rock Hill Shooting
summary: D'Aaron Boyd Colston, 30, is facing murder charges for the shooting death of Brandon Swilling in Rock Hill.
charlotte_impact: Provides updates on crime and justice in the region, ensuring public awareness of ongoing investigations.

title: Man Killed in Lawn Mower Collision
summary: A 63-year-old man died in Lincolnton when his riding lawn mower was hit by a pickup truck. No charges were filed.
charlotte_impact: Serves as a reminder of the importance of safety when operating lawn equipment and driving in residential areas.

title: Arrest Warrants Issued in Deadly Hit-and-Run
summary: Salisbury Police issued arrest warrants for two suspects in a fatal February hit-and-run, seeking nationwide extradition.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates the commitment to bringing justice to victims of hit-and-run incidents.

title: Countdown to Truist Championship
summary: Charlotte prepares for the Truist Championship in May, highlighting the local business impact, fan experience, and safety measures.
charlotte_impact: Promotes a major sporting event and its positive effects on the local economy and community.

title: Crews Respond to Brush Fire in Steele Creek
summary: Crews responded to a spreading brush fire in the Steele Creek area, first reported around 8 a.m.
charlotte_impact: Alerts residents to potential fire hazards and the efforts to contain them.
